title: Global Pulse May'26
headline: Cars24 has never been stronger.
summary: Summarizes Cars24's Global Pulse report for May 2026, highlighting key financial and operating metrics. Transaction GMV increased by 6.8% month-over-month (MoM) to rupees 729 crore. Loans disbursed rose by 5.7% MoM to rupees 317 crore, while ANR increased by 8.5% MoM to rupees 141.6 crore. EBITDA saw a significant increase of rupees 10.8 crore MoM to rupees 3.1 crore. Cars procured and sold globally also increased by 13.3% and 7.1% MoM, respectively.
